description_long: This stool is a simple, block-shaped object with a wood grain texture covering all visible surfaces. The top face displays a pattern of parallel, light brown lines interspersed with darker, oval-shaped pores, reminiscent of end-grain wood. The vertical sides feature elongated, streaky wood grain patterns in shades of tan, brown, and cream, giving the appearance of a solid wooden block. The texture varies slightly between sides, with some faces showing more pronounced, darker streaks and others appearing lighter and more uniform. The overall form is a perfect rectangular prism with sharp, clean edges and no visible joints or fasteners. There are no decorative elements, backrests, or footrests, emphasizing a minimalist, utilitarian design.
description: A blocky, rectangular stool with a realistic wood grain texture and a minimalist, undecorated design.
description_view_0: This view shows a lighter, streaky wood grain pattern on the vertical face and a detailed end-grain pattern on the top.
description_view_1: This side displays a darker, more weathered wood grain with less contrast, and the top's end-grain pattern is visible.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this face has a lighter, streaky wood grain, with the top showing the same end-grain detail.
description_view_3: This view mirrors view 1, with a darker, more mottled wood grain and the top's end-grain pattern.
